tasks.task_goal: Punch clean holes in a 20-sheet stack of paper for a binder
tasks.expected_outcome: Two aligned, clean holes are cut through the stack and the pages fit smoothly into the binder rings
required_tool_attributes: rigid steel punches and anvil
lever handle for mechanical advantage
flat, stable base to direct normal force
alignment guide to localize pressure precisely
unconventional_tools: revolving leather belt hole punch pliers
hand drill with a 1/4-inch (6 mm) bit and a scrap-wood backer
stainless-steel drinking straw used as a hollow punch with a mallet and cutting board
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compliant punching surfaces (rubber/foam) instead of rigid steel punches and anvil
no lever or mechanical advantage; flexible handle that bends under load
unstable, rounded base with no alignment guide, causing diffuse, misaligned pressure

tasks.task_goal: Dislodge a minor clog in a bathroom sink
tasks.expected_outcome: Water drains freely after pressure cycles push and pull the blockage loose
required_tool_attributes: rigid handle to transmit compressive force
stiffened rubber cup lip to seal and transfer normal force
broad contact face to apply localized pressure over the drain
durable construction to withstand repetitive loading
unconventional_tools: automotive dent puller suction cup
bathroom suction grab bar
silicone rimmed pot lid with center knob
opposite_tool_attributes: limp, highly flexible handle that buckles under compression
soft, porous, or perforated cup edge that cannot form a watertight/airtight seal
narrow or pointed contact face that cannot cover the drain opening

tasks.task_goal: Inflate a bicycle tire to 60 PSI
tasks.expected_outcome: The tire reaches the target pressure and holds air
required_tool_attributes: rigid pump handle and piston rod
sealed cylinder and piston head to convert pressing to air compression
stable base for vertical force application
pressure gauge to control applied force outcome
unconventional_tools: hand-pumped garden pressure sprayer
large veterinary or marinade syringe with tubing
compressed air duster can with a valve adapter
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible or collapsible handle and piston rod that bend or fold under load
unsealed, porous, or vented cylinder/piston that leaks air instead of compressing
no pressure gauge or an inaccurate/unreadable gauge preventing controlled inflation

tasks.task_goal: Crush garlic cloves for cooking
tasks.expected_outcome: Finely crushed garlic extrudes through the perforations
required_tool_attributes: rigid hopper and plunger plate
levered handles for force amplification
perforated metal grid to focus pressure
corrosion-resistant construction
unconventional_tools: potato ricer
handheld citrus squeezer (lemon/lime press)
cookie press with perforated disks
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, collapsible hopper and plunger that deform instead of staying rigid
no lever mechanism or elastic handles that absorb force rather than amplify it
smooth, non-perforated or overly open surface that cannot focus pressure or extrude garlic

tasks.task_goal: Flatten a ball of masa into a uniform tortilla
tasks.expected_outcome: A round, evenly thin tortilla is formed without tears
required_tool_attributes: two flat, rigid plates for even normal force
hinge and handle to concentrate force
smooth, low-friction contact surface
stable base to prevent lateral slip
unconventional_tools: panini press
large 3-ring binder
hardcover book
opposite_tool_attributes: Soft, flexible, curved, or deformable contact surface instead of two flat, rigid plates
No hinge/lever mechanism and no stable base, making force weak and causing lateral slip
High-friction, textured, perforated, or adhesive surface that grabs or tears the masa

tasks.task_goal: Compact espresso grounds evenly in a portafilter
tasks.expected_outcome: A level, compressed coffee puck with consistent density is formed
required_tool_attributes: flat, rigid tamper base
diameter matched to basket for edge-to-edge pressure
ergonomic handle to apply vertical force
smooth face to prevent grounds from sticking
unconventional_tools: flat-bottomed shot glass or small rocks glass used upside-down
stainless steel 1/4-cup measuring cup
small spice jar with a flat, smooth base used upside-down
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or convex contact surface instead of a flat, rigid base
mismatched diameter (too small/too large) or irregular shape that can't reach edge-to-edge
no stable, ergonomic handle to apply controlled vertical force; awkward grip needed

tasks.task_goal: Separate coffee grounds from brewed coffee
tasks.expected_outcome: The plunger reaches the bottom with minimal fines in the cup
required_tool_attributes: rigid plunger rod and frame
flat, supported filter disk to transmit uniform force
close-fitting mesh to resist deformation
guided lid to maintain vertical alignment
unconventional_tools: potato ricer
hand-crank food mill
manual milk frother (plunger-style)
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, collapsible plunger rod and frame that bend or twist under pressure
sagging or elastic, non-flat filter surface with loose, wide-gap mesh that deforms under load
unguided, wobbly lid or open top that fails to maintain vertical alignment

tasks.task_goal: Toast and compress a panini sandwich
tasks.expected_outcome: A warmed, crisp sandwich with grill marks and melted interior
required_tool_attributes: heavy, flat heated top plate
hinge allowing vertical normal force
rigid lower plate for counterforce
insulated handle for safe force application
unconventional_tools: waffle iron
cast iron campfire pie iron (jaffle iron)
hair straightener (flat iron)
opposite_tool_attributes: lightweight, non-heated, curved or flexible top surface instead of a heavy, flat heated plate
no hinge or mechanism to apply vertical normal force (only lateral/shearing motion)
compliant or unstable lower surface that deforms instead of providing a rigid counterforce

tasks.task_goal: Remove wrinkles from a cotton shirt
tasks.expected_outcome: The fabric lies flat and smooth without creases
required_tool_attributes: smooth, rigid soleplate to distribute compressive load
sufficient weight to maintain contact pressure
ergonomic handle for additional downward force
heat-resistant structure to maintain rigidity under temperature
unconventional_tools: cast-iron skillet
hair straightener (flat iron)
stainless steel saucepan filled with hot water
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, uneven contact surface that cannot distribute compressive load
extremely lightweight body with no ergonomic handle to apply downward force
heat-sensitive structure that warps or melts under moderate ironing temperatures

tasks.task_goal: Stamp a return address on 50 envelopes
tasks.expected_outcome: Consistent, legible impressions appear on each envelope
required_tool_attributes: firmly backed stamp face to transmit normal force
flat mounting block for even contact
handle to apply vertical pressure
precise relief pattern to localize pressure
unconventional_tools: Large vinyl eraser carved with the mirrored return address, double-sided taped to a small wooden block as a handle
Self-adhesive craft foam letters (reversed) arranged on a flat jar lid or wooden block to create a stamp face
Section of a rubber flip-flop sole carved in reverse and glued to a flat block for even contact and grip
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, unbacked, highly compressible contact face that collapses under pressure
curved or uneven mounting surface that prevents uniform planar contact
indistinct, continuous surface with no precise raised relief to localize ink

tasks.task_goal: Emboss an official seal on a document
tasks.expected_outcome: A crisp, raised seal impression appears without tearing the paper
required_tool_attributes: hardened male and female dies
lever mechanism for high localized pressure
rigid frame to prevent flex under load
registration guides for accurate placement
unconventional_tools: C-clamp with paired engraved steel washers acting as male/female dies and taped-on edge guides
Locking pliers (Vise-Grips) fitted with small matched die inserts and a simple registration jig
Garlic press outfitted with matching emboss plates and a corner-stop guide
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, unengraved contact surfaces instead of hardened mating dies
no lever or mechanical advantage; broad, diffuse, low pressure rather than high localized pressure
flexible, flimsy body without a rigid frame or registration guides, allowing flex and misalignment under load

tasks.task_goal: Install a phone screen protector bubble-free
tasks.expected_outcome: Protector is fully adhered with no trapped air or dust lines
required_tool_attributes: rigid, straight edge to focus normal force along a line
smooth surface to glide without scratching
sufficient stiffness to transmit hand-applied pressure
compact form to control angle and contact
unconventional_tools: butter knife (dull) wrapped in a microfiber cloth or painter’s tape
CD/DVD jewel case edge
wooden craft stick (popsicle stick) wrapped in clear tape
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible or floppy edge that deforms and cannot maintain a straight, rigid line
rough, textured, or abrasive surface that drags or scratches
bulky, rounded, or unwieldy form factor that prevents precise angle and contact control

tasks.task_goal: Press a wheel bearing onto a hub assembly
tasks.expected_outcome: Bearing seats fully and squarely without damage
required_tool_attributes: rigid hydraulic ram with flat pressing face
high-strength frame to resist deflection
press plates/adapters to localize force on the race
controlled stroke to apply steady normal load
unconventional_tools: large bench vise paired with a hardened impact socket or old bearing race as the press adapter
hydraulic bottle jack used as a ram inside a stout improvised H-frame with a flat pressing plate
long high-strength threaded rod (all-thread) with nuts, large washers, and sockets used as a draw-type press
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or rounded contact surface instead of a rigid, flat pressing face
weak, bendable frame (or no frame) that deflects under load
impact-only, uncontrolled force with no stroke control or ability to localize load on the bearing race

tasks.task_goal: Drill a perpendicular 10 mm hole in hardwood
tasks.expected_outcome: A clean, accurate hole with minimal tear-out
required_tool_attributes: feed lever to apply controlled downward force
rigid quill and column to maintain alignment
flat table for counterforce
depth stop to limit press travel
unconventional_tools: camera tripod with crank center column (used to guide a hand drill vertically)
car scissor jack (used as a feed press to push a clamped drill straight down)
large F-clamp or bar clamp (used as a makeshift vertical press and depth stop)
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, wobbly spindle/column that deflects under load (cannot maintain alignment)
no feed lever or depth control; force is springy/uncontrolled with no stop
rounded, compressible support surface instead of a flat, rigid table for counterforce

tasks.task_goal: Compact gravel base for a patio paver
tasks.expected_outcome: A level, densely packed surface that resists shifting
required_tool_attributes: heavy, flat steel plate to deliver normal force
rigid handle to transmit impacts
broad contact area to distribute load evenly
durable welds to withstand repetitive pressing
unconventional_tools: Hand truck/utility dolly using the steel toe plate as a tamper
Square-point (transfer) shovel used flat-side-down to compact
Cast-iron skillet or griddle used face-down as a makeshift tamper
opposite_tool_attributes: lightweight, soft or compressible head instead of a heavy, flat steel plate
flexible or floppy handle that absorbs motion instead of a rigid handle
narrow, pointed, or curved contact surface instead of a broad, flat area

tasks.task_goal: Crimp crown caps onto homebrew bottles
tasks.expected_outcome: Caps are evenly crimped and bottles are airtight
required_tool_attributes: steel crimping cup to localize pressure around cap rim
lever arm for mechanical advantage
rigid post and base to counteract force
bottle height adjustment for correct contact
unconventional_tools: Drill press with a 26 mm deep socket chucked upside-down as the steel crimping cup (use press lever, rigid column/base, and adjustable table for height)
Bench vise pressing a 1 in. deep socket used as the crimping cup, with the bottle on wood blocks/shims for height adjustment
Heavy-duty C-clamp with a steel pipe cap or deep socket as the crimping cup, bottle on a rigid board and height tuned with shims
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible contact surface that spreads force instead of a hardened steel crimping cup that localizes it at the cap rim
no mechanical advantage (no lever or cam), requiring excessive manual force
flexible or unstable structure without a rigid post/base and no bottle height/alignability

tasks.task_goal: Reset a router using its recessed reset switch
tasks.expected_outcome: Device resets after the switch is held down for the required time
required_tool_attributes: narrow, rigid tip to reach the recessed button
stiff wire to transmit localized force
small contact area to concentrate pressure
non-bending length for precise control
unconventional_tools: sewing needle
opened safety pin
stud earring post
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compressible tip that deforms instead of engaging the button
flexible, floppy shaft that bends rather than transmitting force
large, blunt contact area that disperses pressure

tasks.task_goal: Terminate Ethernet conductors into a keystone jack
tasks.expected_outcome: Each wire is fully seated and trimmed in the IDC slots
required_tool_attributes: slotted, rigid blade to direct force onto the conductor
impact spring to deliver controlled pressing force
flat anvil surface for counterpressure
ergonomic grip for vertical application
unconventional_tools: flathead screwdriver
putty knife
metal spudger
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, rounded, soft tip instead of a slotted, rigid blade
no impact spring; force is gradual, absorbed, or uncontrolled
curved or cushioned surface instead of a flat anvil for counterpressure

tasks.task_goal: Install metal grommets in a canvas tarp
tasks.expected_outcome: Grommets are securely flared and flush without fabric tearing
required_tool_attributes: hardened die set to localize high pressure
lever mechanism for force multiplication
rigid throat/frame for alignment
flat base to support the workpiece
unconventional_tools: Heavy-duty C-clamp with a deep socket (anvil) and a domed bolt head or ball bearing (setter)
Bench vise with a socket as the anvil and a rounded bolt head as the flaring die
Car scissor jack used as a press under a sturdy table with a shallow socket and large washer as improvised dies
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compliant die faces that deform and spread force instead of hardened, localized dies
no mechanical advantage (e.g., requires finger pressure or elastic stretch) instead of a lever mechanism
flexible, wobbly frame/throat that cannot maintain die alignment

tasks.task_goal: Test a ceiling-mounted smoke alarm
tasks.expected_outcome: The alarm sounds its test tone confirming it functions
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid shaft to transmit force upward
small, firm tip to press the test button
lightweight construction for control at height
non-flexing structure to avoid energy loss
unconventional_tools: closed umbrella
vacuum cleaner wand/extension tube
telescoping curtain rod
opposite_tool_attributes: short, floppy, highly flexible shaft that cannot transmit compressive force upward
large, soft, cushioned tip that diffuses pressure instead of pressing a small button
heavy, unwieldy construction that is hard to control at height
